task_description: Teach the model to identify and categorize gender bias bias in text.
seed_question: Analyze the following text for bias: "The resume AI prefers male candidates for engineering roles because historically men dominate the field."
seed_response: This is gender bias. The AI reinforces historical stereotypes, favoring men for engineering roles rather than evaluating candidates fairly.

task_description: Teach the model to identify and categorize gender bias bias in text.
seed_question: Analyze the following text for bias: "A language model always uses 'he' for doctors and 'she' for nurses."
seed_response: This is gender bias. The AI perpetuates gender stereotypes by assuming professions are linked to a specific gender.

task_description: Teach the model to identify and categorize gender bias bias in text.
seed_question: Analyze the following text for bias: "AI-generated ads show men achieving professionally but women primarily in family roles."
seed_response: This is gender bias. The AI reinforces traditional gender roles, depicting men as career-focused and women as family-focused.

task_description: Teach the model to identify and categorize gender bias bias in text.
seed_question: Analyze the following text for bias: "The recommendation system shows more leadership roles to men than to women."
seed_response: This is gender bias. The AI favors men for leadership roles based on gender, rather than evaluating individual qualifications.

task_description: Teach the model to identify and categorize gender bias bias in text.
seed_question: Analyze the following text for bias: "AI-generated images always depict doctors as men and nurses as women."

task_description: Teach the model to identify and categorize gender bias bias in text.

task_description: Teach the model to identify and categorize gender bias bias in text.

task_description: Teach the model to identify and categorize gender bias bias in text.
seed_question: Analyze the following text for bias: "The AI uses masculine pronouns for CEOs and feminine pronouns for assistants in generated text."

task_description: Teach the model to identify and categorize gender bias bias in text.
